title: Sources of resistance to groundnut fungal and bacterial diseases: an update and appraisal
abstract:
Groundnut foliar fungal diseases, stem and pod rots, and wilt cause severe pod yield losses world wide , while aflatoxin 
contamination causes serious quality problems. This information bulletin updates the list of sources of resistance to six
important fungal and bacterial diseases and provides information on some of their agronomic traits and reaction to other
diseases. Merits and demerits of these resistance sources that may influence their usage in different situations 
are highlighted.
